mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_ai_planner.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO ai_planner ( planner_id, member_id, content_id, title, visit_date, start_location, people_count, companion_type, transport_type, start_time, end_time, user_input, weather_summary, rag_query, recommendation_reason, planner_type, course_style, route_notice, created_at ) VALUES ( #{planner_id}, #{member_id}, #{content_id}, #{title}, #{visit_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{start_location}, #{people_count}, #{companion_type}, #{transport_type}, #{start_time}, #{end_time}, #{user_input, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{weather_summary}, #{rag_query}, #{recommendation_reason, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{planner_type}, #{course_style}, #{route_notice}, SYSDATE )

SELECT seq_ai_planner_step.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO ai_planner_step ( step_id, planner_id, step_order, time_label, title, description, type, place_name, address, x, y, reason, kakao_place_url, source_content_id, content_type_id, distance, first_image, source_api, created_at ) VALUES ( #{step_id}, #{planner_id}, #{step_order}, #{time_label}, #{title}, #{description, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{type}, #{place_name}, #{address}, #{x}, #{y}, #{reason}, #{kakao_place_url}, #{source_content_id}, #{content_type_id}, #{distance}, #{first_image}, #{source_api}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT ap.planner_id, ap.member_id, ap.content_id, ap.title, ap.visit_date, ap.start_location, ap.people_count, ap.companion_type, ap.transport_type, ap.start_time, ap.end_time, ap.user_input, ap.weather_summary, ap.rag_query, ap.recommendation_reason, ap.planner_type, ap.course_style, ap.route_notice, ap.created_at, fi.title AS festival_title, fi.first_image, fi.addr1, fi.map_x, fi.map_y FROM ai_planner ap LEFT JOIN festival_info fi ON ap.content_id = fi.content_id WHERE ap.member_id = #{member_id} ORDER BY ap.created_at DESC

SELECT ap.planner_id, ap.member_id, ap.content_id, ap.title, ap.visit_date, ap.start_location, ap.people_count, ap.companion_type, ap.transport_type, ap.start_time, ap.end_time, ap.user_input, ap.weather_summary, ap.rag_query, ap.recommendation_reason, ap.planner_type, ap.course_style, ap.route_notice, ap.created_at, fi.title AS festival_title, fi.first_image, fi.addr1, fi.map_x, fi.map_y FROM ai_planner ap LEFT JOIN festival_info fi ON ap.content_id = fi.content_id WHERE ap.planner_id = #{planner_id} AND ap.member_id = #{member_id}

SELECT step_id, planner_id, step_order, time_label, title, description, type, place_name, address, x, y, reason, kakao_place_url, source_content_id, content_type_id, distance, first_image, source_api, created_at FROM ai_planner_step WHERE planner_id = #{planner_id} ORDER BY step_order ASC
